title: Normal Eggs
description: A texture pack that brings back the normal look of spawn eggs
body:
- Normal Eggs brings back the classic Minecraft spawn egg textures you know and love.
- Perfect for players who miss the old days or just want their inventory to feel a bit more… _normal_.
- In addition to the restored classics, all new spawn eggs have been added, with completely original color palettes that blend seamlessly with the vintage look.
